FreeBSD rimwks 11.1-STABLE FreeBSD 11.1-STABLE #0 r322996M: Wed Aug 30 00:08:18 MSK 2017     root@rimwks:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/RIMWKSx64  amd64

checking for RADEON... yes

checking for AMDGPU... no
configure: error: Package requirements (libdrm >= 2.4.79 libdrm_amdgpu >= 2.4.79) were not met:

Package 'libdrm_amdgpu', required by 'virtual:world', not found

Consider adjusting the PKG_CONFIG_PATH environment variable if you
installed software in a non-standard prefix.

Alternatively, you may set the environment variables AMDGPU_CFLAGS
and AMDGPU_LIBS to avoid the need to call pkg-config.
See the pkg-config man page for more details.
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please report the problem to x11@FreeBSD.org [maintainer] and attach the
"/tmp/ports/usr/ports/graphics/mesa-dri/work/mesa-17.1.8/config.log" including
the output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might be a good idea
to provide an overview of all packages installed on your system (e.g. a
/usr/local/sbin/pkg-static info -g -Ea).
*** Error code 1


Same issue as: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=221881
looks like some one drops support FreeBSD 11.x
